design_philosophy: Modern, intuitive, and serious. Uses clean lines, highly legible typography, and structured layout (Archetype 4) to evoke medical trust. Uses card-based inputs for checkboxes to reduce cognitive load and provide a modern touch.

colors.primary_description: Dark Blue (Azul Escuro) - used for primary text, main buttons, and strong layout elements to convey seriousness.
colors.secondary_description: Petroleum Blue / Teal (Teal/Azul Petróleo) - used for active states, selected borders, and highlights.
colors.accent_description: Yellow (Amarelo) - used sparingly for warnings, badges, or secondary highlights.

strategies: Headings should use tracking-tight (letter-spacing: -0.025em) and bold weights (font-bold) in the primary dark blue color.
Section overlines (e.g., 'Exames Laboratoriais') should be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-sm, and bold.
Body text should be clear and highly legible (text-base or text-lg for form inputs).

layout.structure: Desktop: Split two-column layout. Left column (40% width, fixed) features the clinic background image with a dark overlay, the logo, and a welcome message. Right column (60% width, scrollable) contains the form. Mobile: Single column, image header, followed by form.
layout.spacing: Use generous spacing. Form sections should be wrapped in surface cards (bg-white) with generous padding (p-8) and separated by gap-8.
layout.alignment: Left-align form inputs and labels for readability.

components.inputs: Use Shadcn UI inputs. Override default styles to be larger (h-12), with rounded-lg borders, border-slate-300. On focus: ring-2 ring-[#0F766E] border-transparent.
components.checkboxes_and_radios: DO NOT use standard small checkboxes. Transform them into clickable interactive cards. Use a flex or grid layout of cards (border border-slate-200, rounded-lg, p-4, cursor-pointer, transition-all). When selected, change border to border-[#0F766E], background to bg-teal-50, and text to text-[#0F766E].
components.buttons: Primary submit button should be large (h-14, text-lg, font-bold), bg-[#0A192F] (Dark Blue), text-white, hover:bg-[#0F766E] (Petroleum Blue) transition-colors.
components.cards: Use flat solid surfaces for form groups. No heavy shadows, just 1px border and shadow-sm to keep it clinical and clean. Avoid glassmorphism for medical tools.

animations.hover_states: Interactive cards lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and gain shadow-md on hover.
animations.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out universally for interactive elements.
animations.success_state: Upon submission, replace form with a success view: centered content, a large green checkmark (animating in with scale and opacity), and a 'Thank You' message confirming the email was sent.

hero_background.description: Abstract, clean medical clinic architectural background.
hero_background.placement: Used as the cover image for the left column (desktop) or top header (mobile). Must have a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure any overlaid text/logo is legible.

logo.placement: Placed prominently over the background in the left column, or at the top of the form. Use rounded corners or a white backing if it needs contrast.

icons.usage: Use icons inside the selectable cards (e.g., Stethoscope for ASO, Ear for Audiometria, TestTubes for Laboratório) to make it intuitive and modern.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup a React page with a two-column split layout (left side fixed branding, right side scrollable form).
2. Add Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' to the application.
3. Use react-hook-form + zod for state and validation. Fields required: Empresa, Funcionário, Função, Autorizado por.

4. For 'Tipo de ASO', implement as a set of visually distinct, clickable cards (Radio group behavior, as usually an employee only has one ASO type at a time). Options: Admissional, Retorno ao trabalho, Periódico, Mudança de função, Demissional.
5. For 'Exames Complementares', implement 'Audiometria' as a toggle card.

6. For 'Exames Laboratoriais', implement a CSS grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2) of checkbox cards. Options: Hemograma Completo, Sumário de Urina, Parasitológico de Fezes, Coprocultura, Beta, Glicemia.
7. Implement a mock email sending function (e.g., a 1.5s Promise delay) on form submit.
8. After successful submit, unmount the form and mount a Success State component thanking the user and confirming the email was sent to the clinic.
9. Ensure every input, button, and selectable card has a relevant data-testid attribute for testing.
